overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing exploration of a sunlit shanty town built from corrugated metal structures. The player navigates narrow covered walkways, discovers a body, interacts with NPCs, and ascends to a balcony overlooking a dense cyberpunk cityscape with massive holographic billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered shanty town walkway with corrugated metal roofing

events.description: discovers a body lying in a doorway on the right side of the path
turns around and begins walking back through the covered walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow covered walkway, discovers a body, then turns back

entered.detail: corrugated metal roofing covering the walkway, creating dappled shadows
traditional red Japanese paper lanterns hanging from the roof structure
rusty corrugated metal walls forming makeshift buildings
small air conditioning unit attached to the metal wall
deceased person lying on their back in a doorway wearing light-colored clothing

segments.scene_description: The player navigates a narrow covered walkway constructed from corrugated metal sheets and wooden supports. Red paper lanterns hang overhead, and sunlight filters through gaps in the roof. At approximately 8 seconds, the player discovers a body lying in a doorway, then turns around to head back through the shanty town.

scene_state.functional_zone: shanty town residential alley with makeshift structures

events.description: approaches a group of NPCs sitting outside a corrugated metal shack

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the shanty town alleyway toward a group of residents

notable_agents.action: group of three NPCs sitting on chairs outside a shack, one stands up as the player approaches

entered.detail: large wooden shipping crate sitting on the ground
red metal barrel used for storage

segments.scene_description: Moving through an open-air alley in the shanty town, the player passes corrugated metal structures and red paper lanterns. The environment opens up slightly, revealing a group of NPCs sitting outside their makeshift homes. The ground is concrete with scattered debris and patches of weeds.

scene_state.functional_zone: open courtyard with scattered belongings and clothes drying

events.description: approaches the entrance to a metal building with stairs visible inside

agents.ego_description: walking through an open courtyard area, observing clothes and debris scattered on the ground

entered.detail: piles of clothing and fabric laid out on cardboard sheets on the ground
yellow vehicle parked in the distance near a building entrance
metal fence and gate structure on the left side

segments.scene_description: The player enters a sunlit open courtyard between corrugated metal buildings. Piles of clothes and cardboard lie scattered on the concrete ground to the left. In the distance, a yellow vehicle is parked near a building entrance with a red light. The area feels deserted compared to the previous section.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior corridor with metal staircase leading upward

events.description: enters the dark interior of a corrugated metal building
begins ascending the metal staircase with yellow railings

agents.ego_description: entering a building and climbing a metal staircase to reach an upper level

entered.detail: metal staircase with yellow painted railings leading upward
translucent plastic sheet hanging as a room divider
bright red plastic chair next to a small desk
old CRT monitor on a small table

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dimly lit interior space with corrugated metal walls. The environment shifts from bright sunlight to mixed lighting. A metal staircase with yellow railings dominates the center of the room, leading upward. To the left, a small workspace with a red chair and computer monitor is visible, while plastic sheets divide the space on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated balcony overlooking dense cyberpunk cityscape

events.description: emerges onto a balcony revealing a panoramic view of the cyberpunk city
pans right to reveal massive holographic billboards and elevated highways

agents.ego_description: standing on a balcony overlooking the city, panning to take in the view of holographic advertisements and skyscrapers

entered.detail: dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings
massive floating digital advertisements including one for 'Bottoms Up' and '3mouths 1desire'
large industrial air conditioning units mounted on the building exterior
green metal safety railing along the balcony edge
yellow metal ladder attached to the building wall

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto an elevated balcony, the scene opens up to reveal a breathtaking cyberpunk cityscape. Massive holographic billboards float between high-rise buildings, advertising various products. Industrial AC units and exhaust stacks punctuate the skyline. The camera pans across the view, showing elevated highways and dense urban architecture bathed in bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior living space with furniture and window views

events.description: re-enters the interior from the balcony

agents.ego_description: moving through interior rooms, passing a red sofa and looking out windows to the courtyard below

entered.detail: worn red fabric sofa sitting against the wall
old television set mounted on the corrugated metal wall
window opening showing the exterior courtyard and adjacent buildings

segments.scene_description: The player returns indoors from the balcony, entering a makeshift living space with a red sofa and wall-mounted TV. The room has corrugated metal walls and windows looking out to the courtyard below. The lighting is a mix of interior shadows and natural light streaming through openings. The player moves through doorways, transitioning between connected interior spaces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a claustrophobic shanty town that eventually ascends to a panoramic view of a sprawling cyberpunk metropolis. It begins by navigating a narrow covered walkway of corrugated metal and red lanterns, passing a body in a doorway before turning back through an open-air alley where NPCs gather amidst concrete debris. The scene then expands into a sunlit, deserted courtyard with scattered cardboard and a parked yellow vehicle, before shifting into a dimly lit interior featuring a metal staircase and a small computer workspace. As the camera climbs the stairs and emerges onto an elevated balcony, the environment opens completely to reveal a breathtaking skyline of massive holographic billboards and high-rise buildings under a bright midday sun. Finally, the perspective retreats back indoors, moving through a makeshift living space with a red sofa and corrugated walls that look back down upon the courtyard below.
